title: Alternate Origin GUI
description: Overhauls the origin selection screen to show multiple in a grid for selection.
body: # Alternate Origin GUI This overhauls the Origin Selection GUI to instead show multiple origins. ![New Origins GUI, showing a array of origins, with two pages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ldWHqZwQ/images/47132cadc0f51ef62ecd7f3cb425cf36bd8d9fd5.png) This shows the new Origin Selection GUI, with two pages, with various origin addons installed. Just clicking on the icon will let you view the typical origin display on the right. ![New Origins GUI, showing the classes from Origins Classes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ldWHqZwQ/images/d89c3abe5a61bd2eeacbc58fb55534f98420cb5b.png) This shows the class selection screen.
